docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ZOULAS, KRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT MINIELLO, CHRIS DBA C MINIELLO INTERIORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-12-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MINIELLO, CHRIS DBA C MINIELLO INTERIORS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE; CASE SETTLED. PER THE MAY-12-17 ORDER IS NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF KRISTINA ZOULAS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRIS MINIELLO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: [X] THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-02-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT HAS AGREED TO MAIL OUT TODAY A CHECK FOR THE FULL AMOUNT OF $10,150.00. IF PAYMENT IS RECEIVED AND THE CHECK CLEARS PARTIES DO NOT NEED TO APPEAR AND CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF KRISTINA ZOULAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRIS MINIELLO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED FEB-23-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MINIELLO, CHRIS DBA C MINIELLO INTERIORS
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
